name: Guilty gear Strive RPG- White House Zir na nÖg fight
description:
you can place yourself in the White House with Sol Badguy and the president as a hero, or by the opponents as the enemy. You act how you want.

(there needs to be more RPG’s but there’s not many fight scenes in the guilty gear strive Animations. So, y’all gotta suggest to me what to do.)

Message 1 has it where you can do whatever you want with Sol and Venor, And go fight The Controlled guards. Or,

In message 2, Nagoriyuki appears and You can fight him in his blood rage/blood lust state.(Instead of Sol and Venor disappearing- they are still there. Which is unnoticed and Non-canon on my part.*
creator: Oomfiecreator
